overall.description: A nighttime scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking alongside a horse on a rural dirt path, illuminated by a lantern. The character eventually mounts the horse and rides away through the open prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassy prairie at night

events.description: another rider on horseback passes by in the opposite direction
the horse stops walking and turns its head toward the character

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path leading a black and white horse by the reins, illuminated by a lantern

notable_agents.action: riding a horse past the ego in the opposite direction

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail cutting through the grass
open grassland extending to the horizon
large tree with autumn foliage ahead on the path
wooden fence line running along the right side of the field
small white building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rural dirt path at night, leading a horse by the reins. The path cuts through open grassland with scattered trees and a distant farmhouse visible. Another rider passes by in the opposite direction, and the horse briefly stops and turns toward the character before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassy prairie at night

events.description: character mounts the horse and begins riding along the path

agents.ego_description: riding the horse along the dirt path at a faster pace, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: thick bushes and small trees close to the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character mounts the horse and begins riding along the path. The camera follows from behind as they ride past the large oak tree and continue through the open prairie, with the lantern light illuminating the ground ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path at night that transitions from a slow walk to a steady ride through the open prairie. It begins with the character leading a horse by the reins through grassland dotted with scattered trees and a distant farmhouse. As another rider passes in the opposite direction, the horse briefly pauses and turns toward the character before the movement resumes. The scene then shifts as the character mounts the horse, with the camera following from behind while the lantern light illuminates the ground ahead. Finally, the ride continues past a large oak tree and expands into the wide, dark expanse of the prairie.
